summary: Prince Kiva has been summoned by the Red Lion House, one of the eight vassals who upheld the Empire. He is concerned about the situation with demons and decides to leave immediately. On his way out, he is confronted by a group of warriors, but they are eventually deterred by the arrival of the Great Wall's commander, Karl. As Kiva departs, he encounters various characters who seem to be waiting for him, including a mysterious figure known as Vanil.
key_moments: Kiva receives an urgent summons from the Red Lion House
He leaves immediately, but is confronted by warriors on his way out
The Great Wall's commander, Karl, arrives and stops the confrontation
